appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: CLI' section with isolation rules, evidence collection criteria, and key paths for CLI-based validation of this refactoring mission.

notes.VAL-CORE-002: Subagent initially reported fail because validation contract listed stale 'original signatures' (i32/u32/usize). Verified via git show 12a0e91^ that scene lib already used narrow types (i16/u16/Color/u32) before the move. Core signatures match pre-move scene lib exactly. Overridden to pass.
notes.VAL-CORE-004: grep 'shaping' returns 5 matches in doc comments (domain terminology 'text shaping'), but zero code references to old shaping crate. Intent of assertion fully satisfied.
notes.buildVerification: cargo build --release exits 0. cargo test --test-threads=1 runs 1462 tests, 0 failures.
notes.concurrency: 3 read-only CLI validator subagents ran in parallel with no interference.
